subject: A humanoid archer drawing a curved organic bow with a glowing green energy arrow, surrounded by circular medallion-emblems depicting creature silhouettes
description: A humanoid figure in light armor stands in a three-quarter stance, drawing a large curved organic bow toward the right. A glowing green-yellow energy arrow is nocked and aimed. Behind the archer, several large circular glowing medallions float in an arc, each containing a silhouette of a different creature rendered in bright green against a golden glow. The background dissolves into verdant green mist and foliage. The overall palette is warm gold and vivid green. The pose is deliberate and focused, conveying precision and power.
foreground: armored archer drawing a curved organic bow with a glowing energy arrow
background: circular glowing medallions with creature silhouettes, green mist and foliage
emotion: focused, composed, determined — arm extended, eye fixed on target
